title: Seven-Colored Realm
content:
Seven-Colored Realm
 is a small world hidden inside a spatial crack in the 
Rank 5 Region
 of 
Cloud Sea Star System
.

It is home to the 
Lost Ones
 and the 
Enlightened Ones
.

It was later revealed that the realm was made by Slaughter, Wang Lin's slaughter avatar that he sent back in time with Flowing Time to find a way to revive Li Muwan.
